steps.title: Name the false entries
steps.content: The passage calls the Wikipedia entries hoaxes and fictitious. Since they were invented entries that remained online until discovered and deleted, the blank needs a noun meaning made-up falsehoods.

steps.title: Reject nonfalse meanings
steps.content: Choice A means careful studies, not false entries. Choice B means surprising disclosures, usually truths, not hoaxes. Choice D means improvements, but the entries deceived readers rather than improving the site. The answer is C.
